title: Event Management State
description: The `event_management_state` object stores user settings for custom saved views of Episode Review. For instructions to save custom views through the UI, see [Save a custom view of Episode Review](https://help.splunk.com/?resourceId=ITSI_EA_CustomizeEpisode) in the _User Manual_.

attributes.name: _key
attributes.label: _key
attributes.description: The unique ID for Episode Review view in the KV store.

attributes.name: title
attributes.label: title
attributes.description: A user-defined name for the custom episode review.

attributes.name: earliest
attributes.label: earliest
attributes.description: The earliest time for the main search in the Episode Review custom view.

attributes.name: latest
attributes.label: latest
attributes.description: The latest time for the main search in the Episode Review custom view.

attributes.name: fetchLimit
attributes.label: fetchLimit
attributes.description: The maximum number of notable events to fetch in a single request.

attributes.name: sortField
attributes.label: sortField
attributes.description: The field in the data (column in Episode Review) to sort notable events by.

attributes.name: sortDirection
attributes.label: sortDirection
attributes.description: Whether to sort notable events in ascending or descending order.

attributes.name: arbitrarySearch
attributes.label: arbitrarySearch
attributes.description: The Splunk search string used to filter raw notable events.

attributes.name: filterCollection
attributes.label: filterCollection
attributes.description: A set of filters that represent the Episode Review page filters.

attributes.name: viewingOption
attributes.label: viewingOption
attributes.description: Whether to display notable events as standard or prominent mode in Episode Review.

attributes.name: eventDeduplication
attributes.label: eventDeduplication
attributes.description: If true, episode view is turned on. Otherwise individual notable events are displayed.

attributes.name: columnsShown
attributes.label: columnsShown
attributes.description: A list of fields in the data (columns in Episode Review) to display.

attributes.name: object_type
attributes.label: object_type
attributes.description: Name of the object type.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _owner
attributes.label: _owner
attributes.description: Splunk user `nobody`.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
